keyEvents.text: Kaishu Sano (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Casemiro (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Brazil 0, Japan 1. Kaishu Sano (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner following a fast break.
Daichi Kamada (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Brazil. Endrick replaces Lucas Paquetá because of an injury.
Danilo (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Brazil 1, Japan 1. Casemiro (Brazil) header from the right side of the six yard box to the top right corner. Assisted by Gabriel Magalhães with a cross.
Substitution, Brazil. Gabriel Martinelli replaces Matheus Cunha.
Substitution, Japan. Junnosuke Suzuki replaces Keito Nakamura.
Substitution, Japan. Yukinari Sugawara replaces Ritsu Doan.
Substitution, Japan. Shuto Machino replaces Junya Ito.
Substitution, Japan. Ao Tanaka replaces Daichi Kamada.
Junnosuke Suzuki (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Brazil. Fabinho replaces Casemiro because of an injury.
Goal! Brazil 2, Japan 1. Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Bruno Guimarães.
Substitution, Japan. Koki Ogawa replaces Daizen Maeda.
Substitution, Brazil. Danilo Santos replaces Bruno Guimarães.
Goal! Germany 0, Paraguay 1. Julio Enciso (Paraguay) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Matías Galarza with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, Germany. Leon Goretzka replaces Felix Nmecha.
Goal! Germany 1, Paraguay 1. Kai Havertz (Germany) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Florian Wirtz with a cross.
Substitution, Paraguay. Gustavo Caballero replaces Gabriel Ávalos.
Substitution, Paraguay. Mauricio replaces Julio Enciso because of an injury.
Substitution, Germany. Jamal Musiala replaces Deniz Undav.
Andrés Cubas (Paraguay) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Germany. Waldemar Anton replaces Aleksandar Pavlovic.
Substitution, Germany. Nick Woltemade replaces Leroy Sané.
Substitution, Paraguay. Gustavo Velázquez replaces Miguel Almirón.
Substitution, Paraguay. Braian Ojeda replaces Juan José Cáceres.
Substitution, Paraguay. Antonio Sanabria replaces Damián Bobadilla.
Kai Havertz (Germany) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Germany. Nadiem Amiri replaces Florian Wirtz.
Substitution, Germany. Malick Thiaw replaces Antonio Rüdiger.
Jamal Musiala (Germany) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Matías Galarza (Paraguay) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Paraguay. Fabián Balbuena replaces Júnior Alonso.
Issa Diop (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Netherlands. Teun Koopmeiners replaces Nathan Aké.
Substitution, Netherlands. Wout Weghorst replaces Brian Brobbey.
Goal! Netherlands 1, Morocco 0. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Crysencio Summerville.
Substitution, Morocco. Anass Salah-Eddine replaces Chadi Riad because of an injury.
Substitution, Morocco. Gessime Yassine replaces Brahim Díaz.
Substitution, Morocco. Samir El Mourabet replaces Ayyoub Bouaddi.
Substitution, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi replaces Azzedine Ounahi.
Substitution, Netherlands. Jorrel Hato replaces Micky van de Ven.
Substitution, Netherlands. Quinten Timber replaces Ryan Gravenberch.
Substitution, Morocco. Chemsdine Talbi replaces Bilal El Khannouss.
Goal! Netherlands 1, Morocco 1. Issa Diop (Morocco) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Chemsdine Talbi with a cross.
Substitution, Netherlands. Marten de Roon replaces Frenkie de Jong.
Substitution, Netherlands. Justin Kluivert replaces Cody Gakpo.
